meaning: American Physical Society,美国物理协会;Advanced Photo System,高级相片系统
examples: Ideogramic ApS is the small Danish startup profiled for this article.
This article studies the impact of XMI on a small development house, Ideogramic ApS.
Ideogramic ApS is a development house that specializes in gestural digitization and collaboration.
The Advantix cameras are based on a hybrid digital-and-conventional technology called APS, for Advanced Photography System.
Risk-free profits are captured by APs when a measurable ETF price discount or premium exists.
